# ThesisFormatSpec

Source: `schemas/thesis-format-spec.schema.json`

Schema ID: `https://thesisdocx.local/schemas/thesis-format-spec.schema.json`

Declarative formatting rules for deterministic DOCX rendering.

## Root

Type: `object`

Required fields: `bibliography`, `bodyParagraph`, `captions`, `compatibility`, `coverPage`, `defaultFont`, `figures`, `headerFooter`, `headings`, `name`, `notes`, `numbering`, `pageSetup`, `schemaVersion`, `sections`, `tables`, `toc`
